basic_identity.skin_type_suitability: All skin types, including sensitive skin

description.overview: A lightweight, fast-absorbing brightening serum formulated with 10% Niacinamide and 2% Alpha Arbutin to visibly reduce dark spots, even skin tone, and minimize the appearance of pores.
description.purpose: Targets hyperpigmentation, uneven skin tone, enlarged pores, and dullness with clinically proven actives.
description.target_audience: Adults 18+ with concerns of dullness, dark spots, oily skin, or uneven complexion. Safe for sensitive skin.
description.texture_finish: Water-like lightweight serum, absorbs within 30 seconds, leaves no residue or greasy feel.

key_active_ingredients.name: Niacinamide (Vitamin B3)
key_active_ingredients.function: Reduces hyperpigmentation, tightens pores, regulates sebum production, strengthens skin barrier

key_active_ingredients.name: Alpha Arbutin
key_active_ingredients.function: Inhibits melanin synthesis for a brighter, more even skin tone; reduces dark spots

key_active_ingredients.name: Hyaluronic Acid (Sodium Hyaluronate)
key_active_ingredients.function: Multi-depth hydration, plumps skin and reduces appearance of fine lines

key_active_ingredients.name: Panthenol (Vitamin B5)
key_active_ingredients.function: Soothes irritation, repairs and strengthens skin barrier, retains moisture

key_active_ingredients.name: Zinc PCA
key_active_ingredients.function: Controls excess shine, reduces blemishes, has mild antimicrobial properties

ingredients.full_inci_list: Aqua, Niacinamide, Sodium Hyaluronate, Alpha-Arbutin, Glycerin, Pentylene Glycol, Panthenol, Zinc PCA, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Sodium Hydroxide, Disodium EDTA, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin
ingredients.allergen_information: Free from all 26 EU-listed fragrance allergens. No nut-derived ingredients. No common contact allergens. Always perform a patch test before first use.

manufacturing_regulatory.manufactured_by: LuminaSkin Laboratories Pvt. Ltd., 45 Industrial Phase II, Gurugram, Haryana 122016, India
manufacturing_regulatory.manufacturing_facility: GMP-certified facility, ISO 22716:2007 compliant, CGMP audited annually
manufacturing_regulatory.regulatory_certifications: KFD registered (South Korea), FDA Registered (USA – Reg. No. 12345678), BIS certified (India – IS 6608), CPNP notified (EU)
manufacturing_regulatory.manufacturing_date_format: MFG: MM/YYYY — printed on outer carton and embossed on bottle base
manufacturing_regulatory.expiry_date_format: EXP: MM/YYYY — printed on outer carton and embossed on bottle base
manufacturing_regulatory.period_after_opening_pao: 24M — use within 24 months of first opening (PAO symbol on packaging)
manufacturing_regulatory.shelf_life_unopened: 3 years (36 months) from manufacturing date when stored correctly
manufacturing_regulatory.batch_lot_number_location: 6-digit alphanumeric code embossed on base of glass bottle (e.g., 230415 = manufactured April 2023)

how_to_use_steps: Step 1: Cleanse face thoroughly and pat dry.
Step 2: Apply toner if part of routine (optional).
Step 3: Dispense 3–4 drops of serum onto fingertips.
Step 4: Gently press and pat the serum into face and neck — do not rub.
Step 5: Wait 60 seconds for full absorption.
Step 6 (Morning): Follow with moisturizer, then SPF 30 or higher.
Step 6 (Evening): Follow with moisturizer or night cream.
Can be layered under eye cream. Apply before heavier creams or oils.
usage_storage_safety.application_frequency: Twice daily — morning (AM) and evening (PM). Can be reduced to once daily for first 2 weeks if new to Niacinamide.
usage_storage_safety.storage_instructions: Store below 25°C (77°F). Keep away from direct sunlight, heat, and humidity. Do not freeze. Keep cap tightly closed after each use. Do not store in bathroom if humid.
usage_storage_safety.packaging_material: 30ml amber glass dropper bottle with borosilicate glass pipette. Outer carton made from FSC-certified 100% recycled cardboard. Printed with soy-based inks. Fully recyclable.
warnings_contraindications: Avoid direct contact with eyes — if contact occurs, rinse thoroughly with clean water.
Conduct a 24-hour patch test on inner arm before first facial use.
Discontinue use immediately if redness, burning, stinging, or irritation occurs.
Keep out of reach of children under 12 years.
Consult a dermatologist before use if pregnant, breastfeeding, or undergoing medical skin treatment.
Do not use on open wounds, broken skin, or active eczema/psoriasis flare-ups.
usage_storage_safety.drug_ingredient_interactions: Avoid combining with high-concentration Vitamin C (L-Ascorbic Acid) in the same routine — may form niacin and cause temporary flushing. Use Vitamin C in AM and this serum in PM if both are in routine. Consult dermatologist if using prescription retinoids, hydroquinone, or topical antibiotics.
usage_storage_safety.sun_sensitivity_note: No photosensitizing ingredients present. However, SPF 30+ is strongly recommended during daytime use for optimal brightening results and to prevent new dark spot formation.

skin_concerns_targeted: Mild acne marks and post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation (PIH)
Early fine lines due to dehydration
claims_benefits.clinical_tested_claims: Dermatologist tested and approved. In an independent 4-week consumer study (n=52, ages 22–45, mixed skin types): 94% reported improved skin radiance, 88% saw visibly reduced dark spots, 91% noticed smaller-looking pores, 96% reported improved hydration, 89% said skin felt smoother. Non-comedogenic tested. Hypoallergenic tested. Ophthalmologist reviewed formula.

visible_results_timeline.immediate: Improved skin hydration and softness within 1–2 hours of first use.
visible_results_timeline.2_weeks: Visibly minimized pore appearance, reduced shine, more balanced skin texture.
visible_results_timeline.4_6_weeks: Noticeably brighter, more even skin tone; reduced appearance of dullness.
visible_results_timeline.8_12_weeks: Significant reduction in dark spots and hyperpigmentation with consistent twice-daily use.

awards_recognition: Cosmopolitan India Editor's Pick — Best Budget Serum 2024
5-star rating: 4.8/5 from 12,000+ verified reviews on Nykaa and Amazon

sustainability_ethics.cruelty_free_status: Yes — certified cruelty-free by Leaping Bunny (CCF). Never tested on animals at any stage of production. No animal testing by third-party suppliers.
sustainability_ethics.vegan_status: Fully vegan — certified by The Vegan Society. Contains no animal-derived or animal by-product ingredients.
sustainability_ethics.packaging_recyclability: Amber glass bottle: 100% recyclable (remove dropper before recycling). Outer carton: 100% recycled and recyclable cardboard. No plastic shrink wrap. Minimal packaging philosophy.
sustainability_ethics.sustainability_commitments: Carbon-neutral shipping on all orders. Refillable bottle program launching Q2 2025 (30% discount on refill pouches). 1% of annual revenue donated to ocean plastic cleanup via 1% for the Planet. Manufacturing facility runs on 60% renewable energy.

where_to_buy: Amazon India, Amazon US, Amazon UK

customer_support.response_time: Email replies within 24 hours on business days
customer_support.returns_policy: 30-day no-questions-asked return policy for unopened products
